reference: ON THE LEFT THE COIL OF ROPE IN THE CENTER THE MODEL OF A SAILING SHIP IN A GREEN GLASS BOTTLE AND ON THE RIGHT THE WOODEN STATUE OF A NEGRO BOY IN BAGGY TROUSERS TURKISH JACKET AND WHITE TURBAN
text: On the left, the coil of rope. In the center, the model of a sailing ship in a green glass bottle. And on the right, the wooden statue of a Negro boy in baggy trousers, Turkish jacket, and white turban.
